title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Infosys Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Infosys Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Infosys Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Infosys Advisory Limited:
Infosys Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys Advisory Limited!
